start.evidence: Branch feat/task-8-bpmn-plan-artifacts cut from main @ 2f83548; scope recorded in backlog/tasks/task-8.

build_pkg.evidence: skills/bpmn-plans/pipeline in commit 7116afc; npm ci reproducible; 13/13 tests green with rendering.

author_skill.evidence: skills/bpmn-plans/SKILL.md and the grilling close hook in commit 7116afc.

validate_skills.evidence: skill-creator quick_validate: 'Skill is valid!' for bpmn-plans and grilling.
validate_skills.note: Executed only after the operator asked whether the validator had been used — the process miss that spawned TASK-9. Validation then passed clean.

verify.evidence: npm test 13/13 (run independently twice); example spec and the real doc-19 plan through the full chain, deterministic.

gw_checks.evidence: 'yes' taken — all checks green on first pass.

review.evidence: One fresh-context read-only reviewer; 4 confirmed findings (dangling AGENTS.md evidence stamps, imprecise task-8 line refs, unwatermarked SVG in assets, empty decision-1 body).

gw_review.evidence: 'no' taken once (4 findings), then proceeded to open_pr.
gw_review.note: The plan's loop implies the post-fix delta re-enters independent review. In reality the owning agent verified the delta itself: affected checks were rerun (regeneration lossless, byte-identical determinism), but no second fresh reviewer was spawned. Accepted because the delta was small and mechanical (evidence re-pointing, asset pruning, doc body fill).

fix.evidence: All 4 findings fixed in one pass; artifacts regenerated; affected checks rerun (pipeline regeneration lossless).

open_pr.evidence: Commit 7116afc (31 files, foreign AGENTS.md/cockpit edits excluded); PR #32 opened with the plan diagram embedded.

operator_gate.evidence: Operator reviewed PR #32 with the diagram and merged.

landed.evidence: Merge commit 7f88432 on main; pipeline and skill live.

rework.note: Branch not taken — no changes were requested at the operator gate.
